Container.Name: runna-sync
Container.Overview: Syncs Runna training plan workouts to Intervals.icu with structured pace and power targets. Workouts auto-push to Garmin Connect. [br][br] Runs continuously, polling the Runna iCal feed hourly. Only syncs when workouts change. Updates existing workouts in place (never creates duplicates). Auto-updates FTP from pace data weekly. [br][br] Commands: sync (default, continuous), once (one-shot), update-pace (recalculate FTP from runs), update-power (FTP from Stryd). [br][br] 6MB image (scratch base, Go static binary).

Config.Name: Runna iCal URL
Config.Description: Your Runna iCal feed URL from Runna app settings

Config.Name: Intervals.icu Athlete ID
Config.Description: Your athlete ID from Intervals.icu (e.g. i247251)

Config.Name: Intervals.icu API Token
Config.Description: API token from Intervals.icu Settings → Developer Settings

Config.Name: Weight (kg)
Config.Description: Your weight in kilograms for power calculation

Config.Name: Target 5K (minutes)
Config.Description: Your target 5K time in minutes for FTP estimation

Config.Name: Sync Days Ahead
Config.Description: How many days ahead to sync workouts

Config.Name: Poll Interval (minutes)
Config.Description: How often to check for iCal changes
